Generated Narrative: CodeSystem nasa-data-archive-cs

This case-sensitive code system https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-data-archive-cs defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
mmis Medical Mission Information SystemPrimary NASA medical information system for crew health records.
areas Astronaut Radiation Exposure Assessment SystemProtected database for astronaut radiation exposure records.
meme Medical Equipment Management EnvironmentSystem for managing medical equipment and supplies.
pacs Picture Archiving and Communication SystemSystem for storing and retrieving medical images.
emr Electronic Medical RecordAstronaut electronic medical record system.

name: NASADataArchiveCS
title: NASA Medical Data Archive Systems
description: Data archive and delivery systems for NASA medical data.

concept.definition: Primary NASA medical information system for crew health records.
Protected database for astronaut radiation exposure records.
System for managing medical equipment and supplies.
System for storing and retrieving medical images.
